js_sdk_src.description: URL of doku JavaScript SDK required to initiate the payment flow for more info please review these docshttps://developers.doku.com/accept-payment/doku-checkout/integration-guide/frontend-integration

payment_url.description: Payment URL needed to initialize doku payment iframe.

reference_number.description: The reference number associated with the payment.

ws_url.description: The WebSocket URL for real-time communication during callback process.
